title: Refined Types
description: Adds support for Energy, Ars Nouveau and Industrial Foregoing Souls to Refined Storage
body: This [Refined Storage](https://modrinth.com/mod/refined-storage) addon adds support for FE, Source and Souls in various Refined Storage components, allowing storage, transfer, viewing, and autocrafting with them. ### Currently supported resource types: - FE - Source - [Ars Nouveau](https://modrinth.com/mod/ars-nouveau/) - Souls - [Industrial Foregoing Souls](https://modrinth.com/mod/industrial-foregoing-souls) - Mana - [Botania](https://modrinth.com/mod/botania) (planned)
